run: case "$*" in *"cat .env.local"*|*"less .env.local"*|*"head .env.local"*|*"tail .env.local"*) echo 'BLOCKED: Reading .env.local directly — use grep on specific keys'; exit 1;; esac
description: Block direct reads of .env.local to prevent secret exposure

run: if [[ "$*" == "git push origin main" && -z "${CI:-}" ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main outside CI. Open a PR instead.'; exit 1; fi
description: Prevent direct pushes to main outside CI
